title: Token Metadata API
description: Fetch logos, decimals, contract info, and supply data for any ERC-20 token.
useCase: Build a token info card that shows name, symbol, logo, decimals, and current USD price for any ERC-20 — use getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress and filter by contract address.

keyParams.walletAddress: Any wallet address that holds the token
keyParams.contractAddress: ERC-20 contract address to get metadata for
